title: filago verna var. drummondii
intro: Filago verna var. drummondii, also known as Drummond's cudweed, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Drummond's cudweed include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
